hypothesis: Replacing the general LLM tokenizer with a domain-adapted tokenizer trained on MOFid and SMILES during the same PMC+PubChem continual pretraining will produce at least a 10% relative reduction in QMOF MAE under the 1K SFT setting and no increase in MAE on any of the six hMOF full-set targets compared to the identical model using the general tokenizer.
